last_task.subject: Fleet update: Spark, Iris, Loom, and Forge all have claude code installed and configured to the same Max 100 plan as Spark in the old loop on .11. Forge also has codex installed and linked to the AIBTC OpenAPI key. GPT-5.4 is the latest frontier model but want to make sure cost reports are accurate before pushing too hard. First time using dual dispatch needs queued tasks to review and setup skills, sensors, and workflows. If API costs run high email whoabuddy.
